why.keep_all: user-ratified keep-all: 15/15 registered, 0 defect-side flags (qa_work/frame_metrics.json) — FWHM median 3.574 px (CV 9.5%), roundness 0.848, ~1723 stars/frame; no defect class present.
why.wfwhm_advisory: wfwhm excess median 0.186 / p90 0.428 px and nstars_min_frac 0.825 are advisory only — wfwhm mixes dither distance with matching loss and no defect-side flag fired; kept.
why.weight_null: wFWHM weighting at low FWHM spread is worse than none (Siril -weight is a min-max ramp — the worst frame soft-culls at any spread; dead-ends).
